check_enhanced_sync.title: Check enhanced sync and DXVK settings
check_enhanced_sync.description: Checking whether enhanced sync (esync/msync) is enabled and DXVK is configured for optimal performance.

fix_enable_esync.title: Enable enhanced sync
fix_enable_esync.description: Enabling enhanced sync reduces CPU overhead and improves frame pacing. Enable the DXVK HUD in Graphics settings to monitor frame times after applying this fix.

verify_fix.title: Did this improve performance?
verify_fix.description: Try launching the program and playing for a few minutes. Check if stuttering or instability is reduced.

escalate.title: Additional diagnostics needed
escalate.description: Try enabling the DXVK HUD in Graphics settings to monitor frame times, and check the Game Config section for recommended performance settings. Export a diagnostic report for further analysis.

resolved.title: Problem resolved
resolved.description: The performance issue has been improved. You can export a session report for your records.
